title: [Fujito10] IGPX Immortal Grand Prix (2005) Episode 17 (1080p BluRay Remux) [Fanmade Hybrid Audio - Fixed] (Revision 1)
description:
Remember downloading this release? https://nyaa.si/view/2116271

Well, in terms of Hybrid Audio, today I thought I'd experiment with one of the songs exclusive to the Microseries; as I think about it, when I had the unknown song that plays before the countdown for Team Satomi's race against Velshtein begins in this episode fade into "Make Your Peace", all I was hoping for was a natural way to segue into "Battle of Bongo Hill", the song that plays as the race actually begins. Well, the song I chose was "Potential Catastrophe" by VideoHelper, replacing "Make Your Peace", and I gotta say... this song, I feel, works a LOT better. But that's not the only reason why I'm uploading this revision.

Y'see, as I took a look in the episode itself, I noticed that some dialogue amongst the Satomi members and Sir Hamgra (still before the race begins, BTW) was too outta sync for my tastes, so I went ahead and made corrections. Since we don't know the name of the unknown song that plays during this part, nor do we even know if it got released commercially at all, I had no choice but to artificially stretch the Toonami audio ever so slightly in between sections while STILL having to keep it relatively seamless. It's still not perfect (particularly when Liz says, "God you sound just like Takeshi" and Sir Hamgra makes his speech), but it should be a major step up. As for the music, I had "Catastrophe" kick in after Luca meows after Amy says "Life is certainly full of surprises, isn't it?" in the hospital. Special thanks to the IGPX fansite: https://www.theigpx.com/pilot

Will make a brand new parent torrent with this updated episode 17 sometime so that those who prefer to just download it all with everything up to date (new or old downloaders) can do so.

description:
I reencoded these movies with slightly greater bitrate and using the fantastic stylized subtitles by [kneelack](https://nyaa.si/view/2095753). I actually went through and changed the names used during the credits sequence for each of the films so the voices are properly matched with the english voice actors when you have the english dub selected. Komga (and Kavita Canary) is able to open and serve JXL files, they will auto-convert if accessing (OPDS) application does not handle JXL.

description:

title: [Hellinouille] World Trigger Kaï 04 - L’enrôlement au Border
description:
# **[Hellinouille] World Trigger Kaï 04 - L’enrôlement au Border**
![](https://zupimages.net/up/26/23/dljq.jpg)

---

# **PRÉSENTATION**
**World Trigger Kaï** est une relecture de l'animé World Trigger qui se veut plus concise et plus conforme au manga original, et offrant un plus grand plaisir de visionnage. Les scènes HS sont coupées au maximum et certains passages sont remis dans le bon contexte afin d'obtenir une œuvre plus fidèle au manga.

# **SYNOPSIS**
Ville de Mikado. Un beau jour, un portail vers un univers parallèle apparaît soudainement dans la ville. Des créatures nommées “Frontaliers” venues de l’autre dimension en sortent, ravageant tout sur leur passage et semant le chaos. Cet autre monde dispose de technologies différentes et évoluées, laissant celles de la Terre sans effet. Alors que tout semble perdu, un mystérieux groupe sort de l’ombre et repousse les Frontaliers. Ayant égalé la technologie des Frontaliers par leurs propres moyens, ils créent une organisation nommée “Border” ayant pour but de protéger la Terre de ces invasions.
Quatre ans après ces événements, un Frontalier Humanoïde du nom de Yûma Kuga arrive dans la ville de Mikado où il fait la rencontre de Osamu Mikumo, un agent de l’organisation Border.

# **COMMENTAIRES**
Ce film couvre les épisodes 17 à 21 de l'anime et les chapitres 33 à 43 du manga.

[Vous trouverez ici toute la correspondance entre les épisodes et chapitres de World Trigger.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/World_Trigger_Ka%C3%AF)

Pour plus d'informations, des news, réagir sur nos Kais, et pour regarder nos films en streaming, RDV sur [notre Discord !](https://linktr.ee/FanKai "discord link")

Nous réalisons également des versions Fan-Kai de nombreux autre anime, en VF et/ou VOST : Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece et bien d'autres à venir…

## **INFOS UPLOAD**
Montage : Hellinouille
Langues :  ![Japonais](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/jp_JP.png "Japonais") Japonais
Sous-titres : ![Français](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/fr_FR.png "Français") Français
Format : MKV
Résolution : 1080p

title: [Fuchs] Shigatsu wa Kimi no Uso - S01 (GER BD Remux 1080p AVC FLAC 2.0) [Multi-Audio] (Japanese, German/Deutsch Dubs) [OV] [OmU] [DF] [Synchro] | Sekunden in Moll | Your Lie in April
description:
# **Sekunden in Moll**
**[Die komplette Serie (S01)][S01]** ➤ [OVA (S00E01)][S00E01]³

[Ebenfalls auf nekoBT erhältlich.][nekoBT]

---

**Video**
- [GER BD][GER BD] Remux (1080p AVC 8-bit)¹ -> fest eingeblendete Schild- und Liedtext Untertitel

**Ton**
1. Japanisch - Originalton (2.0 FLAC 16-bit)
2. Deutsche Synchronisation (2.0 FLAC 16-bit)

**Untertitel**
1. Deutsche Untertitel (PGS)² -> nur Dialog

**Menü**
- Prolog | OP | Teil A | Blickfang | Teil B | Folgentitel | ED | Vorschau | ED | Epilog⁴

**Extras**
- OP1, OP2, ED1 und ED2 ohne Abspann

**Bemerkungen**
¹ Die Bildqualität dieser Blu-ray ist eigentlich ganz ordentlich, nur ist das Bild etwas zu unscharf. Die Qualität der Schilder ist zwar einfach, aber sie erfüllen ihren Zweck. Sie sind *ein wenig* gestaltet.
² Wenn du die deutsche Synchronfassung anschaust, solltest du diese Untertitel ausschalten.
³ Zu dieser Serie gibt es eine OVA-**Folge**, die auf den japanischen Blu-rays enthalten ist, in Deutschland jedoch nicht lizenziert und daher weder mit deutschen Untertiteln versehen noch synchronisiert wurde (siehe [Blu-ray][Blu-ray] und [aniverse][aniverse] auf Prime Video); sie ist daher hier nicht enthalten. Diese Folge ist optional und sollte NACH der Hauptserie angesehen werden. In dieser Folge werden die Hintergrundgeschichten dreier Hauptfiguren, die in der Hauptserie nur kurz angeschnitten wurden, näher beleuchtet. Du findest die OVA-Folge in [sam]s Veröffentlichung mit *englischen* Untertiteln.
⁴ Jede Folge ist in zahlreiche Kapitel unterteilt, damit du jeden beliebigen Teil der Folge überspringen kannst. Um dies automatisch zu erledigen, kannst du [mpv][mpv] mit [diesem Skript][script] mit [diesen Einstellungen][settings] verwenden (entferne die Auskommentierung der Zeile). Außerdem kannst du Folgendes in deine input.conf-Datei einfügen, um die Steuerung manuell vorzunehmen: `Enter add chapter 1` und `Shift+Enter add chapter -1`. Speichere die Datei und drücke einfach während der Wiedergabe jederzeit die Eingabetaste, um sofort zum nächsten Videokapitel zu springen. Wenn du Hilfe bei der Einrichtung brauchst, sag mir einfach Bescheid. PS. Es sind auch Kapitelabschnitte für die schwarzen Bilder am Anfang und am Ende jeder Folge enthalten, sodass du diese ebenfalls automatisch überspringen kannst.

**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Flowers Media](https://vk.com/flowersmedia)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | AniSlovo (Donate684)


**Описание:**
Продолжение истории.
Бывший работник компании Мачио Хираку с 30-и лет валялся в больнице, не в силах справиться с болезнью. Но в 39 лет над ним смилостливился Бог из другого мира: вылечил, омолодил, дал кучу перков (Мачио решил не болеть, жить в спокойном месте, знать местные языки и быть фермером). Ну а в довершение Бог выдал Мачио «Универсальный фермерский инструмент», который выглядит как мотыга, но по его желанию может превращаться в разные инструменты. В другом мире Мачио начал обустраивать свою новую жизнь и менять жизни тех, кто к нему присоединялся (потихоньку собирая себе гарем).

title: [anime4life.] Elfen Lied + OVA BD_1080p DTS-HD Dual Audio
description:
Synopsis
Lucy is a special breed of human referred to as Diclonius, born with a short pair of horns and invisible telekinetic hands that lands her as a victim of inhumane scientific experimentation by the government. However, once circumstances present her an opportunity to escape, Lucy, corrupted by the confinement and torture, unleashes a torrent of bloodshed as she escapes her captors.

During her breakout, she receives a crippling head injury that leaves her with a split personality: someone with the mentality of a harmless child possessing limited speech capacity. In this state of instability, she stumbles upon two college students, Kouta and his cousin Yuka, who unknowingly take an injured fugitive into their care, unaware of her murderous tendencies. This act of kindness will change their lives, as they soon find themselves dragged into the shadowy world of government secrecy and conspiracy.

title: [Unfucked] Gals Can't Be Kind to Otaku!? - S01E09 (1080p CR WEB-DL AVC AAC 2.0) | Otaku ni Yasashii Gal wa Inai!?
description:
TS taken from the German track *(a few minor edits)*, merged with English

if a fansub group picks the show up, or CR unfucks the show themselves, i will drop it

__only the English track has been edited. the rest are untouched from Crunchyroll__

---

#### **what is this?**

starting in late 2025, crunchyroll has been trying to make the switch to a new subtitling pipeline that strips away typesetting. this means on-screen text like signs, phone screens, and letters, which used to be styled to blend in better with the actual on-screen text, are now just generic, centered white text that often clutters the screen. the "Unfucked" project is where i merge the English script with typesetting from other language tracks to make it more watchable for English viewers. 

**this project was started in spite of these recent events, but not *all* of the shows covered by this project are strictly because of this enshittification, as i will explain below.**

if i'm making these "Unfucked" versions of a show, it is because that show meets one of these criteria:
- adversely affected by their arbitrary subtitle enshittification for its English subs. you can learn more about all of this [here](https://daiz.moe/crunchyroll-is-destroying-its-subtitles-for-no-good-reason/)
*or*
- third-party/licensor-provided subtitles with no TS *(such as Aniplex-licensed shows)*. this has always been an occasional thing on CR with certain shows, and isn't really CR's fault, but rather the licensor's

---

if you're curious about the state of subtitles for each CR show every season, check out [this](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1YSXp5jxPE4LMAyaPH5sl9xXbZiSjnD_zRRZbZ26Rk44/htmlview#gid=1496712011) community-run spreadsheet *(it has a Legend tab so you can get a better sense on what each of the different types mean)*

and remember, tell your normie friends to **Cancel Their Crunchyroll Subscription**

title: Exorcist 2 Human Exorcism (Onmyoji 2 - 陰陽師2 人魔調伏) 2002 Sub ITA-ENG (Koji Shiraishi) VHS x264
description:
![alt text](https://a.ltrbxd.com/resized/film-poster/9/4/1/3/2/2/941322-exorcist-2-human-exorcism-0-2000-0-3000-crop.jpg?v=57fcf8c5da)
[IMDB page](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt17076632/)
[Letterboxd page](https://letterboxd.com/film/exorcist-2-human-exorcism/)

Release year: 2002
Director: Koji Shiraishi
Genre: Horror, Mockumentary
Audio language: Japanese
Subtitle languages: English, Italian (both in .ass)
Source: VHS

This is the sequel to 2001's "The Exorcist's Vengeful Curse", which you can download [here](https://nyaa.si/view/2078754) or by clicking on my name at the top of this page

**[.:Technical data:.]**

**[.:Video:.]**
Format                                   : AVC
Format/Info                              : Advanced Video Codec
Format profile                           : Progressive High@L3.1
Format settings                          : CABAC / 4 Ref Frames
Format settings, CABAC                   : Yes
Format settings, Reference frames        : 4 frames
Codec ID                                 : V_MPEG4/ISO/AVC
Duration                                 : 1 h 27 min
Bit rate                                 : 2 409 kb/s
Width                                    : 640 pixels
Height                                   : 480 pixels (effective resolution is ∼240p due to it being a VHS movie)
Display aspect ratio                     : 4:3
Frame rate mode                          : Constant
Frame rate                               : 59.940 (60000/1001) FPS
Color space                              : YUV
Chroma subsampling                       : 4:2:0
Bit depth                                : 8 bits
Scan type                                : Progressive
Bits/(Pixel*Frame)                       : 0.131

**[.:Audio:.]**
Format                                   : AAC LC
Format/Info                              : Advanced Audio Codec Low Complexity
Codec ID                                 : A_AAC-2
Duration                                 : 1 h 27 min
Bit rate                                 : 192 kb/s
Channel(s)                               : 2 channels
Channel layout                           : L R
Sampling rate                            : 48.0 kHz
Frame rate                               : 46.875 FPS (1024 SPF)
Compression mode                         : Lossy

**Notes:** Raw VHS digitized by Nicky_Cage.
As far as I know the movie only exists on VHS, so the quality is unfortunately limited by the native analog medium, which is ∼240p.
In this one I used the correct honorific -shi when applicable to be more faithful to what's being said, compared to the first movie where I mistakenly left -san.
The "official" title of the movie is Human Exorcism, but that's not entirely accurate, it's more like Curse of the Human-Demon.
If you wish to support me: https://ko-fi.com/yourfriendlykebab

Thank you to @stegosawr for reviewing the subtitles and providing a bunch of improvements to Final8 and also helping with QC for this release.  
  

\- Episodes 1–2 contained heavily broken signs, including mistimed, mispositioned, and inconsistent typesetting.  
\- Later episodes were in slightly better condition, but every episode still required extensive sign fixes and consistency adjustments.  
\- Split all detectable 3-line subtitles into more readable formatting where possible.  
\- Some longer 2-line subtitles remain unchanged to preserve timing and readability.  
\- Added all missing fonts and corrected various font-related issues throughout the series.  
\- Restyled the script using Gandhi Sans.  
\- Corrected inaccurate ED lyrics translation. The most notable error was “a money will become a money,” while the text is about "turning into a monkey"

	時価総額世界一の自動車メーカーとなったアメリカの「テスラ」。イーロン・マスクＣＥＯが“人間が運転するより安全”とアピールし、投資家の期待を集めてきた。しかしドイツの新聞が内部告発をもとに安全神話を検証する記事を掲載。米当局も捜査に乗り出した。何が起き、何が問われているのか。注目の調査報道。　原題：ＥＬＯＮ　ＭＵＳＫ　ＵＮＶＥＩＬＥＤ　ＴＨＥ　ＴＥＳＬＡ　ＥＸＰＥＲＩＭＥＮＴ（ドイツ　２０２５年）

title: 先人たちの底力　知恵泉　吉田正　戦争と“いつでも夢を”のはざまに
description:
先人たちの底力　知恵泉　吉田正　戦争と“いつでも夢を”のはざまに
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年06月02日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:45 (45分)
昭和歌謡史に輝くヒットメーカー、吉田正。ムード歌謡から青春歌謡まで幅広く活躍した作曲家生活の原点は、実は過酷な戦争体験にあった。戦友たちを支えた希望の歌の真実。

	アマチュアとして音楽を楽しんでいた吉田正の運命を変えたのは戦争だった。満州やシベリアで何度も死線をさまよう過酷な生活。樹皮に譜面を書きつけてまで打ち込んだ作曲への夢に希望をつなぐ。戦後、その苦労が偶然にプロへの道を開くことになる。なかなかヒットが出ない中、盟友・鶴田浩二の一言がもたらした転機とは。橋幸夫ヒットの秘けつを語る当時の貴重なインタビュー映像。愛弟子・三田明が語る、驚きの新人育成法。

	５万人を超える子どもが死傷し、家を追われ、学びの場を奪われたガザ地区。教室代わりの仮設テントに置かれた１冊の学級日誌に、子どもたちの日常が、素直な言葉と絵で記録されている。日誌が映し出すのは、２年に及ぶイスラエルの攻撃で街の大半が破壊され、今も避難生活が続くガザの現実だ。日記に綴られる“あした”への願いを見つめ、瓦礫の中でも確かに育まれる希望のかたちとは？

	人気の豚キムチに豆腐をプラスした、「キムチ肉豆腐」。肉が少量でもボリューム感が出て大満足。フルフルの食感も楽しめます。キムチは漬け汁も入れてしっかり味にしましょう。「豆腐とトマトのサラダやっこ」は、冷ややっこのおしゃれなアレンジ。ドレッシングで味つけしたトマトとハムをのせます。水けが出ないよう、食べる直前に盛りつけましょう。

	料理研究家の有元葉子さんに初夏の手仕事を教わる特集の２日目。今回はサラダ感覚で手軽につくれる「塩漬け」と有元さんが母から受け継ぐ「ぬか漬け」を教わります。まずは、きゅうりなど好きな野菜でつくれる「塩漬け」。料理のついでに作っておけば、ドライカレーの具材に、少量ずつ盛っておしゃれな一皿に、大活躍します。「ぬか漬け」は有元さんの母の味。朝晩かき混ぜ、育てるような楽しさがありますよ！

title: きょうの健康　血管の老化を防ぐ！「生活習慣を整える」
description:
きょうの健康　血管の老化を防ぐ！「生活習慣を整える」
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年06月02日 午後8:30 〜 午後8:45 (15分)
年齢とともに少しずつ老化する血管はときに動脈硬化になる。予防の鍵は食事、運動、健康的な体重の維持、血糖・コレステロール値・血圧の管理、禁煙、十分な睡眠の確保だ。

	血管は年齢とともに少しずつ老化する。そしてときに血管の老化が速く進み、硬くなったり、血液の通り道が狭くなる「動脈硬化」になることも。血管が老化するスピードを遅くして、動脈硬化を防ぐための鍵は生活習慣。具体的には健康的な食事、定期的な運動、血糖値の管理、健康的な体重の維持、コレステロール値の管理、血圧の管理、禁煙、十分な睡眠の確保だ。血管の健康を守るために知っておきたい生活習慣のポイントを紹介する。

Уилл поступил в магическую академию, чтобы стать её выдающимся учеником. Он усердный молодой человек, но у него есть серьёзная проблема — он не умеет пользоваться магией. И всё же Уилл не сдаётся. Пусть он не умеет пользоваться палочкой, зато владеет мечом. Сражаясь с монстрами в подземельях, парень может набирать необходимые баллы, чтобы оставаться в академии. Уилл продолжает стремиться к вершине волшебного мира, дабы сдержать важное обещание.

title: マケン姫っ！ 全24巻 [コミック][EPUB][DL版] - MangaEpub
description:
![img](https://i.imgur.com/fAHoe0P.png)

# 📚 漫画EPUB情報＆ガイド / Manga EPUB Info & Guide

EPUBファイルは、PC・スマホ・メディアサーバーなど様々な方法で閲覧・変換できます。

---

## 📦 ファイル互換性と変換方法 / File Compatibility and Conversion

このEPUBは、[Komga](https://komga.org/) や [Kavita](https://www.kavitareader.com/) のようなメディアサーバーを含め、多くのリーダーで使用できます。

> **EPUBファイルは7-ZipまたはWinRARで開くことができます。**  
> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合も、**EPUB2CBZ**を使えば正しい順序で画像抽出できます。  
> 📌 **画像（JPG）形式で保存したい場合は、EPUB2CBZでCBZ形式に変換するのが最も簡単です。**

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps  
🔗 **EPUB2CBZダウンロード** – https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases  

---

## 🧰 EPUB2CBZとは？ / What is EPUB2CBZ?

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

※ Calibreも代替手段として使用可能ですが、変換精度や右開き対応の面でEPUB2CBZを推奨します。

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア   

**iPhone**  
- [Books（Apple Books）](https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/apple-books/id364709193)
- [Readium Mobile（Readium Mobile）](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/thorium-reader/id6745025189)

**Android**  
- [Readera](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.readera&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

---

## 📬 お問い合わせ / Contact

以下の内容に興味がある方は、[このPastebin](https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV)に記載のメールアドレスへご連絡ください：

- 購入した漫画の保存方法を学びたい方  
- 透かしなしの最新刊漫画を交換したい方  
- KomgaやKavitaを使って自分専用の漫画サーバーを作りたい方  
- 👉 [所持書籍リストはこちら](https://drive.proton.me/urls/BAZ6RRJQ7G#BIpsiGyFdrDj)

---

If you're interested in:

- Learning how to preserve the manga you’ve purchased  
- Trading newly released manga with **NO WATERMARKS**  
- Setting up your own manga server using **Komga/Kavita**  
- 👉 [List of books](https://drive.proton.me/urls/BAZ6RRJQ7G#BIpsiGyFdrDj)

Please reach out via the contact details listed in [this pastebin](https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps).

title: [Unfucked] I Made Friends with the Second Prettiest Girl in My Class - S01E09 (1080p CR WEB-DL AVC AAC 2.0) | Class de 2-banme ni Kawaii Onnanoko to Tomodachi ni Natta
description:
TS taken from the German track *(a few very minor edits)*, merged with English

if a fansub group picks the show up, or CR unfucks the show themselves, i will drop it

__only the English track has been edited. the rest are untouched from Crunchyroll__

---

#### **what is this?**

starting in late 2025, crunchyroll has been trying to make the switch to a new subtitling pipeline that strips away typesetting. this means on-screen text like signs, phone screens, and letters, which used to be styled to blend in better with the actual on-screen text, are now just generic, centered white text that often clutters the screen. the "Unfucked" project is where i merge the English script with typesetting from other language tracks to make it more watchable for English viewers. 

**this project was started in spite of these recent events, but not *all* of the shows covered by this project are strictly because of this enshittification, as i will explain below.**

if i'm making these "Unfucked" versions of a show, it is because that show meets one of these criteria:
- adversely affected by their arbitrary subtitle enshittification for its English subs. you can learn more about all of this [here](https://daiz.moe/crunchyroll-is-destroying-its-subtitles-for-no-good-reason/)
*or*
- third-party/licensor-provided subtitles with no TS *(such as Aniplex-licensed shows)*. this has always been an occasional thing on CR with certain shows, and isn't really CR's fault, but rather the licensor's

---

if you're curious about the state of subtitles for each CR show every season, check out [this](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1YSXp5jxPE4LMAyaPH5sl9xXbZiSjnD_zRRZbZ26Rk44/htmlview#gid=1496712011) community-run spreadsheet *(it has a Legend tab so you can get a better sense on what each of the different types mean)*

and remember, tell your normie friends to **Cancel Their Crunchyroll Subscription**

title: [Unfucked] I Want to End This Love Game - S01E08 (1080p CR WEB-DL AVC AAC 2.0) | Aishiteru Game wo Owarasetai
description:
TS taken from the German track *(a few very minor edits)*, merged with English

if a fansub group picks the show up, or CR unfucks the show themselves, i will drop it

__only the English track has been edited. the rest are untouched from Crunchyroll__

---

#### **what is this?**

starting in late 2025, crunchyroll has been trying to make the switch to a new subtitling pipeline that strips away typesetting. this means on-screen text like signs, phone screens, and letters, which used to be styled to blend in better with the actual on-screen text, are now just generic, centered white text that often clutters the screen. the "Unfucked" project is where i merge the English script with typesetting from other language tracks to make it more watchable for English viewers. 

**this project was started in spite of these recent events, but not *all* of the shows covered by this project are strictly because of this enshittification, as i will explain below.**

if i'm making these "Unfucked" versions of a show, it is because that show meets one of these criteria:
- adversely affected by their arbitrary subtitle enshittification for its English subs. you can learn more about all of this [here](https://daiz.moe/crunchyroll-is-destroying-its-subtitles-for-no-good-reason/)
*or*
- third-party/licensor-provided subtitles with no TS *(such as Aniplex-licensed shows)*. this has always been an occasional thing on CR with certain shows, and isn't really CR's fault, but rather the licensor's

---

if you're curious about the state of subtitles for each CR show every season, check out [this](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1YSXp5jxPE4LMAyaPH5sl9xXbZiSjnD_zRRZbZ26Rk44/htmlview#gid=1496712011) community-run spreadsheet *(it has a Legend tab so you can get a better sense on what each of the different types mean)*

and remember, tell your normie friends to **Cancel Their Crunchyroll Subscription**

title: Bleach iTunes (2019) Web-DL (incomplete)
description:
***
Untouched 2019 iTunes Bleach Web-DL. The best source, but is unfortunately incomplete. Hoping sharing these can stir things up.

Contains episodes:
268-272
308-310

Info:
Dub only, contains orphan fields at 23.p, so I almost believe this was the Cine file with only the original SD deinterlacing applied, some segments are half-rate (12fps).

Uploaded as part of an upcoming R2J DVD 168-366 encode,
***

@lost108 This conclusion was reached after extensive attempts to encode every source known to man, it has the benefit of "retaining" Bleach's native production resolution (not crushed IE 720x480 or 720x576 DVDs). It's framerate is also consistent and clean compared to the Amazon ITA Web-DL and ITBD (ignoring the half-rate segments). Its biggest issue is the 2010s era H264 web compression. It still contains deinterlacing artifacts though, but that is ubiquitous among every source. JPBD is very warped IMO, I remember watching 205(?) and vehemently disliking its appearance. My encode doc will delve deeper into the issues Bleach has as a TV series, as every source apart from this and R2J (perhaps too R1) is missing certain frames from scene boundaries.

title: [Kekkan] Champignon no Majo (WebRip 1080p AV1 Multi-Subs) / シャンピニオンの魔女 / 简繁内封 / PT-BR / Sub Esp / VOSTFR / Sub ITA / 01-12 / S01 / Batch
description:
Thank you for downloading our encode.  
This is the mini encode at 6.7 GiB. For the main encode at 24.1 GiB, head to [https://nyaa.si/view/2117028](https://nyaa.si/view/2117028).  
We didn't redo this encode using the BD because the main factor limiting the quality of this release is not the source, where CR is already fairly good, but the capability of the encoder (software) at this target filesize. This encode was performed with care using the best method available and, we believe, is still the best encode you can get at this filesize as of right now.  

Thanks to **Cyan** for their wonderful **English** fansubs, and  
thanks to **绿茶字幕组** for their carefully crafted **简繁日双语** fansubs.  

Please enjoy!  

---

![Luna-san and Lize-san](https://i.imgur.com/8giKafq.png)  

![Luna-san and Lize-san](https://i.imgur.com/NZrzTe2.png)  

---

This is a high effort filtering and encoding for *Champignon no Majo* and should be the best version you can get at this filesize as of right now.  
**slow.pics compare:** [https://slow.pics/c/h16Epbs2](https://slow.pics/c/h16Epbs2) (episode 01 to 03)  
Additional improvements have been discovered in the encoder that helps with texture retention. Texture retention in episode 04 onwards should be even better than the compare above.  

For filtering, the main episode is descalable. We descale the main episode using `vsscale.Rescale`, and then we write a custom `akarin.Expr` to carefully dampen the sharpness of the descaled image. Thanks to many people in the JET server such moe teaching me the method, we fully recover the layer of 1080p texture on top of the image after descale.  
The OP and ED of this anime is not descalable. Instead we use a stronger `vsTAAmbk.TAAmbk` to deal with the OP, protected by a custom `akarin.Expr` taper. And we use `vsaa.based_aa` to perform aa on the ED.  
Also, as usual, before the aa, OP from multiple episodes are merged using `vsdenoise.frequency_merge`.  

For denoise, the main episode doesn't quite need a denoise at all. Instead we only use `dctf.DCTFilter` to clean up some slightly annoying checkerboard in the source.  
For OP and ED, we use the typical `vsdenoise.mc_degrain` → `vsdenoise.bm3d` → `vsdenoise.nl_means` to stabilise dynamic noise.  
At last we apply a very conservative dose of `vsdenoise.DFTTest` before sending to the encoder.  

This anime has this layer of texture on top of the image, which is really hard to encode.  
We use the very latest version of 5fish/SVT-AV1-PSY for this encode, and we squeeze out every bit of potential of the encoder for this encode.  
This is the full encoding parameters: `--preset 2 --crf 29.50 --tune 0 --scm 0 --noise-level-thr 16000 --chroma-qmc-bias 2 --balancing-q-bias 1 --balancing-luminance-q-bias 7.0 --balancing-r0-dampening-layer -3 --enable-variance-boost 0 --qm-min 9 --chroma-qm-min 11 --noise-norm-strength 4 --ac-bias 3.0 --variance-md-bias 1 --variance-md-bias-thr 5.5 --complex-hvs -1 --dlf-bias 1 --dlf-bias-max-dlf 6,2`.  
Specifically, apart from the usual parameters, we use `--balancing-r0-dampening-layer -3` to control the filesize. And we use `--noise-norm-strength 4 --ac-bias 3.0` to try to fully retain the layer of texture on top of the image.  

The NCOP and NCED is encoded using BD source, and filtered similarly. They are encoded using x265 4.2+36+62 [Mod by Patman] using `vsmuxtools.settings_builder_x265(tune="grain", crf=19.20, cutree=True, bframe_bias=75, ipratio=1.3, pbratio=1.4, psy_rdoq=3.0, deblock=[1, 1])` with an additional dithering film grain layer.  

Thanks to all the people creating the tools, plugins and vsfunc's that make this possible, and thanks to everyone in the community for teaching me, pointing out issues, and giving me advice.  

If you're interested in AV1 encoding for anime, you are welcome to join AV1 weeb edition at [https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7).  

You are welcome to do anything with this encode, including remuxing and republishing it. However, we would ask you to leave a credit to Kekkan if you can.  

---

* **Audio**:

title: [Kekkan] Champignon no Majo (BDRip 1080p HEVC FLAC Multi-Subs) / シャンピニオンの魔女 / 简繁内封 / PT-BR / Sub Esp / VOSTFR / Sub ITA / 01-12 / S01 / Batch
description:
Thank you for downloading our encode.  
This is the main encode at 24.1 GiB. For the mini encode at 6.7 GiB, head to [https://nyaa.si/view/2117029](https://nyaa.si/view/2117029).  

Thanks to **Cyan** for their wonderful **English** fansubs, and  
thanks to **绿茶字幕组** for their carefully crafted **简繁日双语** fansubs.  

Please enjoy!  

---

![Luna-san and Lize-san](https://i.imgur.com/8giKafq.png)  

![Luna-san and Lize-san](https://i.imgur.com/NZrzTe2.png)  

---

This is a high effort filtering and encoding for *Champignon no Majo*.  
**slow.pics compare:** [https://slow.pics/c/15vrEyFa](https://slow.pics/c/15vrEyFa)  

The BD is very nice. There are very few cases where the WEB contain more information than BD.
We perform a MinMax merge of WEB and BD on luma in the episode. Essentially, if the BD has more information than WEB, we do nothing. If the WEB has more information than BD, we allow WED in. The WEB is decheckerboarded before joining with merge.  
In the OP, as usual, we perform a Lehmer merge of multiple episodes of BD. The OP merge is nice, but contains quite heavy blocking. It also demands way more bitrate than the main episode, so instead we perform an additional light `vsdenoise.deblock_qed` on the OP to reduce the blocking and control the filesize.  

The main episode is descalable. We descale the main episode using `vsscale.Rescale`, and then we write a custom `akarin.Expr` to carefully dampen the sharpness of the descaled image. Thanks to many people in the JET server such moe teaching me the method, we fully recover the layer of 1080p texture on top of the image after descale.  
The OP and ED of this anime is not descalable. Instead we use a stronger `vsTAAmbk.TAAmbk` to deal with the OP, protected by a custom `akarin.Expr` taper. And we use `vsaa.based_aa` to perform aa on the ED.  

This anime has a static layer of texture on top of the image, which is really hard to encode. This layer of static texture also makes it impossible to denoise protectively due to this layer of texture having different motion vectors than the underlying content.  
Without denoise, we resort to tuning the encoder to try to control the filesize at or around 2.0 GiB.  
Specifically to control filesize in a source that's very static as this, we emphasise inheritance by boosting P frames and dampening B frames. Based on `vsmuxtools.settings_builder_x265`, we set `bframe_bias=75`, `ipratio=1.3`, and `pbratio=1.4` for the encode.  
To alleviate blocking in the case of intra mode being used on noise in B frames, where there isn't enough quantisation to support encoding the noise from scratch, we slightly increase `psy_rdoq` to `3.0`. And to overall take care of blocking both from the source and from encode, we set `deblock=[0,0]`.  
At last, we add a basic layer of dithering noise via `aom_film_grain` (not included in the slow.pics compare above).  

Thanks to all the people creating the tools, plugins and vsfunc's that make this possible, and thanks to everyone in the community for teaching me, pointing out issues, and giving me advice.  

You are welcome to do anything with this encode, including remuxing and republishing it. However, we would ask you to leave a credit to Kekkan if you can.  

---

* **Video**:  
  [Kekkan] Filtered and encoded. JPBD sourced from Bikko@U2. WEB sourced from SubsPlease.  
* **Audio**:  
  Japanese  
  [Kekkan] Sourced from JPBD from Bikko@U2, downsampled to 16-bit / 48000 Hz, and losslessly encoded.  
* **Subtitles**:  
  English  
  [Cyan] subtitles. Including both a [Kekkan] restyled version and an untouched version.  
  中文（简体） / 中文（繁體）
  [绿茶字幕组] subtitles; Untouched.  
  العربية / français / Deutsch / italiano / português (Brasil) / русский / español (Latinoamérica) / español (España)  
  [Kekkan] restyled subtitles, originally sourced from ToonsHub. Deutsch subtitles are not available in some episodes.

title: [hydes] A Kite [USBD Remux][Dual-Audio] [8A82ACDC]
description:
not my release

didn't see it uploaded so I figured I would do it


2024 Discotek USBD remux

Description from Nyaa:

Compared to the 2007 JP DVD and [the older] JP BD, the Japanese 2.0 track on Kitty Media’s 2017 US BD and Discotek’s 2024 US BD is more limited and has two segments with a pretty noticeable channel volume imbalance. Also, the center channel of the Japanese 5.1 track on these US BDs is mastered weirdly, with significant dips from ~2 kHz to ~8.5 kHz and from ~11 kHz to ~18 kHz, causing everything in it to sound muffled compared to the 2.0 mix. Only the center channel has these EQ dips, and the other main channels’ (1, 2, 5, 6) mastering is closer to the 2.0 mastering.

Save for some additional top-end noise on the Discotek versions, the English 2.0 and 5.1 tracks were essentially the same on the 2004 Kitty Media US DVD (didn’t have 5.1), Kitty Media BD, and Discotek BD. I suspect that none of the 5.1 mixes of either language are true lossless based on their frequency cut-off points. Discotek’s tracks had also been padded to 24-bit, so I downsampled them to 16-bit.

I’m interested to know if there’s a good version of the JP 5.1 mix out there, so let me know if you have a release that might have one. I checked out the Kitty Media DVD’s 5.1 track, but it seemed to be an upmix.

The subtitles I took from the Discotek BD and OCR’d, styled, retimed, and typeset them. I also added back one missing line from the 2017 US BD subtitles.

This is the full-length version.

1. Discotek US BD Remux (1920x1080, 23.976 fps)

Audio:

2. Japanese 5.1 FLAC (2024 US BD)
3. English 2.0 FLAC (2024 US BD)
4. English 5.1 FLAC (2024 US BD)

title: [Orphan] Arabian Nights - Sindbad no Bouken (1080p)
description:
Orphan presents a new version of Toei's 1962 feature-length cartoon *Arabian Nights: Sindbad no Bouken* (Arabian Nights: Sinbad's Adventures). In this version, Sinbad and his young friend Ali can only dream of going to sea until a shipwrecked old man washes up on shore. Before dying, he tells them of a mysterious island full of five-colored gems. Inspired, the two stow away on a cargo ship and eventually become crew members. After an interlude in a port of call involving the beautiful Princess Samir and the evil Vizier Torfa, Sinbad convinces his captain to go find the island. Samir tags along, and the Torfa pursues them in his own ship. The island is indeed full of treasure, but it is also full of mortal terrors and perils that Sinbad must overcome.

title: 編成王川島（８）Ｓｅａｓｏｎ２シソンヌ長谷川の短歌で啖呵を切る文芸バラエティー
description:
編成王川島（８）Ｓｅａｓｏｎ２シソンヌ長谷川の短歌で啖呵を切る文芸バラエティー
[総合] 
2026年06月01日 午後11:00 〜 午後11:30 (30分)
短歌の五・七・五・七・七にのせて啖呵を切る、新しい形の文芸バラエティー『ＴＡＮＮＫＡ』！出演者たちの怒りや憂いを込めた感情ほとばしる言葉のアートが誕生する！

	▼蓮見翔（ダウ９００００）、吉住、Ｒａｃｈｅｌ。言葉のプロたちが個性の詰まったＴＡＮＮＫＡを披露▼企画リーダー・シソンヌ長谷川が番組史上初めての大失態！？川島明、朝日奈央ら出演者が総ツッコミ▼全国の視聴者も参戦！笑いと共感性あふれるＴＡＮＮＫＡを発表▼恋愛、ファン、有名芸能人、家族、学校など。怒りと憂いがたっぷりの作品の中から「特選ＴＡＮＮＫＡ」に選ばれるのは！？▼歌人・小島なおの作品講評も！

title: こころの時代　ファンタジーに秘められた宗教（３）『ムーミン』
description:
こころの時代　ファンタジーに秘められた宗教（３）『ムーミン』
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年06月01日 午後10:50 〜 午後11:50 (1時間0分)
架空の物語でありながら現実を照らし、私たちの夢や希望、苦しみや哀しみに寄り添うファンタジーの名作。そこに秘められたメッセージを宗教を手掛かりに探る６回シリーズ。

	第３回は、フィンランドで生まれ、世界１２０をこえる国と地域で親しまれている『ムーミン』を取り上げる。物語の舞台「ムーミン谷」には姿も性格も価値観も異なるさまざまな仲間たちが共に暮らす。なぜムーミン谷では「違い」を持つ存在たちが共にいられるのか。戦禍で生まれたムーミンの物語と著者トーベヤンソンの人生、物語に込められた祈りをひもときながら、現代に通ずる宗教性（スピリチュアリティ）を考えていく。

title: 映像の世紀バタフライエフェクト　イランとアメリカ　そして日本　石油をめぐる百年
description:
映像の世紀バタフライエフェクト　イランとアメリカ　そして日本　石油をめぐる百年
[総合] 
2026年06月01日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:45 (45分)
シルクロードの要衝として栄え、悠久の歴史を誇るイラン。だが１９世紀末に豊富な石油資源が見つかると一変する。石油は希望をもたらすと同時に争いの火種となっていった。

	１９５１年、イギリスが支配する石油の富を取り戻すためイランは石油国有化に踏み切った。対するイギリスはペルシャ湾に軍艦を派遣し威嚇する。窮地のイランを救ったのは日本の石油会社だった。圧力に屈せず石油を買い付けた。その後アメリカの介入により政権は倒れイランは親米国家へ変わる。アメリカは莫大な石油利権を手にした。だが国民の怒りは爆発、イスラム革命で反米国家に転じる。石油をめぐる思惑が交錯した百年の記録。

title: 国際報道２０２６　日韓関係追い風に　増加する日韓カップル
description:
国際報道２０２６　日韓関係追い風に　増加する日韓カップル
[BS] 
2026年06月01日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:44 (44分)
韓国では、韓国人男性と日本人女性のカップルの婚姻件数が去年１年間で１４８３件と２０２０年の２倍近くに急増。日韓カップルの増加に焦点をあてる

	韓国では、韓国人男性と日本人女性のカップルの婚姻件数が去年１年間で１４８３件と、２０２０年の２倍近くに急増。Ｋポップやアニメなど日韓双方の若者の間で文化に親しみを持つ層が増えたことが背景にあると指摘されている。結婚式の相談は日韓カップルでにぎわい、日韓の結婚後の日常を紹介するユーチューバーも人気を集める。日韓関係が改善するなか、両国間交流の象徴ともいえる日韓カップル増加に焦点をあてる

title: 英雄たちの選択　幕末維新の先駆者・横井小楠　公議公論の政治へ
description:
英雄たちの選択　幕末維新の先駆者・横井小楠　公議公論の政治へ
[BS] 
2026年06月01日 午後9:00 〜 午後10:00 (1時間0分)
坂本龍馬や勝海舟を驚嘆させた幕末の思想家・横井小楠。開国か攘夷かで日本が二分するなか、朝廷と幕府、諸藩らによる合議で国の方針を決めるべく大胆な計画を打ち出した！

	坂本龍馬、勝海舟、吉田松陰など幕末の名だたる英傑たちがこぞって慕い、その教えを乞うた思想家・横井小楠。時代のはるか先をみつめ、国の未来へ向けた提言を続けた。その小楠が幕末動乱のさなかに福井藩主・松平春嶽のもとで計画した驚くべき秘策があった！国交を迫る諸外国の公使を京に集め、将軍・関白・有力大名らで議論を行い、開国か鎖国か、国の大方針を決めようというのだ。歴史に埋もれた幕末の知の巨人の活躍に迫る！

title: きょうの料理ビギナーズ　節約しながら　おなかも満足！（１）１袋使いきり！もやし
description:
きょうの料理ビギナーズ　節約しながら　おなかも満足！（１）１袋使いきり！もやし
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年06月01日 午後9:25 〜 午後9:30 (5分)
家計がピンチのときにおすすめの節約レシピを紹介します。ポイントはお買い得食材を使うこと。今回は安くてボリュームのある、もやしです。１袋を使いきるレシピをご紹介！

	カレー味のひき肉ソースをもやしにからめる、「もやしのドライカレー風」。強めの火加減で短時間でもやしを炒めることが、水っぽくさせないコツです。「もやしとひき肉のスープ」は、たっぷりのもやしを入れたタンメン風のおかずスープ。ひき肉を炒めて引き出したうまみが味のベースです。好みで酢を加えてサンラータン風にするのもおすすめです。

title: きょうの料理「有元葉子の」　梅仕事
description:
きょうの料理「有元葉子の」　梅仕事
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年06月01日 午後9:00 〜 午後9:25 (25分)
手仕事シーズンの初夏。料理研究家の有元葉子さんに、食卓に欠かせないという梅干しと漬物のつくり方をセンスあふれるご自宅やアトリエで２日間にわたって教わります。

	手仕事シーズンの初夏。料理研究家の有元葉子さんに、食卓に欠かせないという梅干しと漬物のつくり方をセンスあふれるご自宅やアトリエで２日間にわたって教わります。１日目は梅仕事。「青梅のメープルシロップ漬け」は炭酸で割って飲むと夏の疲れが吹き飛びます。さらに有元さんの母の味「昔ながらの梅干し」も紹介。気候の変化に敏感になったり昔の人の知恵に感心したり。有元さんと一緒に梅仕事するような気分でご覧ください。

title: きょうの健康　血管の老化を防ぐ！「コレステロール以外も注意」
description:
きょうの健康　血管の老化を防ぐ！「コレステロール以外も注意」
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年06月01日 午後8:30 〜 午後8:45 (15分)
血管は加齢・生活習慣の影響で老化し動脈硬化になることも。その前兆は健康診断などの結果からわかる。コレステロールだけなく血圧・血糖なども含めて総合的に確認したい。

	全身に酸素・栄養素を運ぶ血管。血管は加齢や生活習慣の影響で老化する。ときに動脈硬化になることも。自覚症状がほとんどないために、心筋梗塞・脳梗塞などになってはじめて気がつくこともある。動脈硬化の前兆は健康診断などの結果から読み取ることが可能だ。自分のリスクを知り・対処するためにも、コレステロールだけなく、血圧、血糖、腎臓の働きなども含めて総合的に確認し、健診などを受けっぱなしにしないことが大切だ。

title: 鶴瓶の家族に乾杯　続・寅さんツアー！劇団ひとり感涙！たつの市の旅
description:
鶴瓶の家族に乾杯　続・寅さんツアー！劇団ひとり感涙！たつの市の旅
[総合] 
2026年06月01日 午後7:57 〜 午後8:42 (45分)
『男はつらいよ　寅次郎夕焼け小焼け』の舞台・兵庫県たつの市を巡る劇団ひとりの旅・後編。寅さんが見た山や歩いた橋を発見！桜の名所ではプロポーズ話＆夫婦円満の格言。

	男はつらいよシリーズ屈指の名作『寅次郎夕焼け小焼け』の舞台・兵庫県たつの市を、劇団ひとりが巡る旅・後編。寅さんが見た山、歩いた橋を発見！５０年前の映画そのままの風景に感涙！さらに町の人たちに出会う度に「絶対に行って！」と次々に増えていく目的地．．．嵐のように龍野の名所を駆け巡る。さらに「子育てが終わったら僕は家に必要？」劇団ひとりのリアルな悩みに、女性がズバっと回答。一方の鶴瓶は、のんびり旅。

title: クローズアップ現代“ガチグルメ”が席巻！多国籍タウンから見るニッポンの今
description:
クローズアップ現代“ガチグルメ”が席巻！多国籍タウンから見るニッポンの今
[総合] 
2026年06月01日 午後7:30 〜 午後7:57 (27分)
コリアンタウン・新大久保で進むグルメの“多国籍化”。ネパールやベトナムの“絶品ガチグルメ”の魅力に迫る。物価高や円安、外国人政策の変化に揺れる街を徹底取材。

	韓国の最新トレンド発信地・新大久保で加速しているのがグルメの「多国籍化」。ダルバートやパニプリ、バインミーなど、ネパールやベトナムの“ガチグルメ”の店が次々登場。日本のエスニックマニアが絶賛する名物シェフも。小規模で多彩な店がひしめき街の賑わいを支える一方で、物価高騰や円安の影響、さらに外国人政策の変化によりグルメを支える人たちに動揺も広がっている。多国籍タウン新大久保からニッポンの今を読み解く。

title: 偉人の年収　Ｈｏｗ　ｍｕｃｈ？　日本ウイスキーの父　竹鶴政孝

	大正時代にスコットランドへ渡り、伝統的なウイスキーのつくりかたを学び、日本で初めて本格的なウイスキーを製造・販売した竹鶴政孝。あるスコットランド人女性との出会いが人生を大きく変えました。結婚のきっかけは占い？独立後の会社を支えた果物とお菓子とは？朝ドラ「マッサン」のモデルとなったその生き方を、今野浩喜が悲喜こもごも演じます。谷原章介、山崎怜奈はどんな突っ込みをするのか？「酒は人の心が移るもの」

**Описание:**
Аниме «Зависимая девушка: Передозировка» создано по мотивам игры Needy Girl Overdose. Аниме рассказывает о психически нестабильной стримерше, патологически желающей чужого одобрения.
Наша главная героиня - Амэ, бросивший школу депрессивный подросток с низкой самооценкой, социофобией и букетом других ментальных расстройств. Чтобы платить за аренду, а также удовлетворять свои парасоциальные потребности во внимании, Амэ решает начать вести прямые трансляции в Интернете. Она жаждет набрать 1 миллион подписчиков за 30 дней любыми способами.
Нас ждет история о закулисье стримерш, онлайн косплеерш, вьютуберов, о котором сами представители индустрии не любят говорить вслух. Обслуживание клиентов, спонсоров, рекламщиков, продажа симпам "на время" и все "прелести" на которые идут стримеры ради получения заветного внимания и популярности.

title: Galaxy Express 999 Eternal Fantasy (1998) FANSUB VOSTFR 1080p 10bits BluRay x265 FLAC -SnC-Fansub & GundamGuy
description:
![alt text][logo]

[logo]: https://i.imgur.com/bU0xXKK.jpeg

## 📚 Synopsis
Les aventures d'un petit garçon qui voyage de planète en planète à bord d'un train, le Galaxy Express 999, dans le but de venger la mort de sa mère.

## 🎞️ Informations Release

| Vidéo | Audio |Sous-Titres |
|:-------------|:-------------|:-------------|
Blu-Ray Américain | Japonais (FLAC 5.1) | Traduction Fansub - GundamGuy & [SnC-Fansub](https://nyaa.si/user/SNC?f=0&c=0_0&q=Galaxy+Express) |

### 📜 Note de l'uploader :

Bonjour à tous !

Voici le troisième et dernier film de Galaxy Express 999.
Pas forcément le plus connu, et pourtant il mérite qu’on s’y attarde un peu.

L’histoire :
* D’une durée d’environ 50 minutes, Galaxy Express 999: Eternal Fantasy adapte le début du second voyage de Tetsurō et Maetel, à partir du second cycle du manga. L’intrigue se déroule environ un an après les événements de Adieu Galaxy Express 999 : Tetsurō est revenu sur Terre, mais la paix n’a pas duré et une nouvelle menace apparaît.
Sentant qu’il est de nouveau en danger, Maetel revient le chercher à bord du Galaxy Express 999. Ensemble, ils repartent pour un nouveau voyage, cette fois en direction de la mystérieuse planète Eternal.
Contrairement aux deux premiers films, qui tournaient surtout autour de l’Empire mécanique et de la mécanisation de l’humanité, Eternal Fantasy ouvre un nouvel arc avec une nouvelle menace : l’Empire des Metalnoïdes. Le film a aussi la particularité de s’arrêter de manière assez abrupte, puisque le projet a été raccourci et ne propose pas de véritable conclusion.

Vidéo et audio :
* Côté vidéo, c’est à ce jour le seul film de la saga à ne pas avoir bénéficié d’une restauration 4K, et il n’existe qu’en Blu-ray 1080p. J’ai donc pu travailler à partir d’un remux du Blu-ray MediaOCD.
Le film n’ayant jamais été officiellement licencié chez nous, il n’existe pas de doublage français. J’ai donc conservé la piste japonaise en 5.1.

Sous-titres :
* Concernant les sous-titres, il s’agit de mon premier vrai exercice de traduction japonais vers français.
Jusqu’à présent, les traductions étaient généralement faites en croisant la version anglaise avec l’ASS japonais, afin de vérifier au mieux le résultat. Sur ce film, les sous-titres existants ne m’ont pas semblé satisfaisants avec beaucoup de non-sens, des contresens, des passages qui sonnaient faux, et une qualité globale assez inégale.
Du coup, avec la SnC, nous avons repris le travail directement depuis l’ASS japonais, afin de proposer aujourd’hui une traduction française entièrement retravaillée. J’espère que ce travail de traduction vous conviendra et que vous pourrez apprécier le film.

J’espère qu’un jour ce film, ainsi que la série, auront droit à une sortie officielle.

En vous souhaitant une excellente journée, et à la semaine prochaine !
Oui oui, il reste encore quelques releases à sortir !

D’autres sorties sont prévues dès que les Blu-ray seront disponibles et que j’aurai le temps :

> Sentenced to Be a Hero
> My Status as an Assassin Obviously Exceeds the Hero’s

description:
Public version of https://releases.moe/14073/
[Join the Seadex discord server](https://discord.gg/rFwHDKHfJr)

Video: Yousei-raws  
Audio: Japanese Opus 2.0 \[JPNBD\]  
Subtitles: English \[Final8\], English \[USABD\]  
  
Headpatter is Yousei-raws + Restyled Final8 (Staircase with their own ED) with a bunch of fixes, and PGS  
  
Thank you to @stegosawr for reviewing the subtitles and providing a bunch of improvements to Final8 and also helping with QC for this release.  
  

\- Episodes 1–2 contained heavily broken signs, including mistimed, mispositioned, and inconsistent typesetting.  
\- Later episodes were in slightly better condition, but every episode still required extensive sign fixes and consistency adjustments.  
\- Split all detectable 3-line subtitles into more readable formatting where possible.  
\- Some longer 2-line subtitles remain unchanged to preserve timing and readability.  
\- Added all missing fonts and corrected various font-related issues throughout the series.  
\- Restyled the script using Gandhi Sans.  
\- Corrected inaccurate ED lyrics translation. The most notable error was “a money will become a money,” while the text is about "turning into a monkey"

description:

Thanks to Un----ed for their official English subtitles with better typesetting.  

Hope you enjoy this intense but heartwarming anime.  

---

![Purple Lollipop](https://i.imgur.com/DA4795Q.png)  

---

This is a medium effort filtering and encoding for *NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE*.  
**slow.pics compare:** [https://slow.pics/c/ThFixBbw](https://slow.pics/c/ThFixBbw)  

The CR bitrate is not enough to properly record this anime. But luckily there are three different CR sources available for this anime, which makes this encode possible.  
For the episode, we apply a `vsdenoise.frequency_merge` with a custom adder in the higher frequencies. For the OP, we Lehmer merge all the available episodes together.  
During the merge for the episode, we apply a basic AA via `vsaa.based_aa`, and a weaker dehalo via `vsdehalo.dehalo_alpha` protected by a `bilateral` based protection on the lower frequencies itself to protect the noise from these operations.  

After the merge, we apply a base deband via `vsdeband.pfdeband` using `placebo_deband`. This should be able to addresse the occasional strong banding in the source.  

In the encoding, we apply a very strong layer of fine noise on top of the image. The main reason is that even after the merge, flashback scenes and alike still look terrible without a heavy layer of grain. We choose a very fine noise because we think it fits the general feeling of this anime.  
We use the latest May 26 version of 5fish/SVT-AV1-PSY for this encode. We target a filesize around the same as source, which is about enough to deliver a rather high quality encode. We use `--crf 19.60 --lineart-psy-bias 3 --texture-psy-bias 6 --psy-bias-optimize-b 1` for the encode. In some specific sections like the ED of episode 03, we manually zone the section and encode using different parameters to not go too overboard.  

Thanks to all the people creating the tools, plugins and vsfunc's that make this possible, and thanks to everyone in the community for teaching me, pointing out issues, and giving me advice.  

If you’re interested in AV1 encoding for anime, you are welcome to join AV1 weeb edition at [https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7).  

You are welcome to do anything with this encode, including remuxing and republishing it.

title: Digimon.Data.Squad.2006.S01.1080p.Blu-ray.MULTi.AAC.2.0.HEVC-VELO
description:
![Blu-ray poster](https://assets.mmsrg.com/isr/166325/c1/-/ASSET_MMS_162046585/fee_786_587_png)
![VeloEncodes banner](https://i.ibb.co/NnVYvJY/hrtFLIT.jpg)

Well, I'm a couple of months late, but I finally did. Multi-audio 1080p mux with Japanese, English, German and Portuguese audio. Almost forgot that I had the original 480p dual-audio release from IRC on one of my HDDs. Vibecoded a quick Python script to mux in audio from the 480p to the Blu-ray release, with intelligent replacement for the OP and ED themes, using chapters from `[Bunny-Hat Raw]`'s release as a reference point. Now onto Tamers and eventually Frontier again after this!!



| **Stream**                                 | **Source**                                    |
|--------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| KSM Anime 1080p Blu-ray video              | `[F-R]` (sarachikorita on Nyaa)               |
| Original Japanese Audio                    | `[F-R]` (sarachikorita on Nyaa)               |
| English Dub Audio with JP OP and ED themes | IRC release + `[F-R]` (sarachikorita on Nyaa) |
| German Audio                               | `[F-R]` (sarachikorita on Nyaa)               |
| Portuguese Audio                           | `[F-R]` (sarachikorita on Nyaa)               |
| Subtitles                                  | `Ryuu-Rogue` (courtesy `[F-R]`)               |
| Chapters                                   | `[Bunny-Hat Raw]`                             |



[**MediaInfo (episode 1)**](https://pastebin.com/5crjD5iK)


**P.S.:** VeloEncodes has officially moved from Telegram to Discord. Join our shiny new Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/FeGhVA2CAy).

*Enjoy, and don't forget to seed!*

title: [Trix] Ghost Concert: Missing Songs S01E09 [WEBRip 1080p AV1 Opus] (Multi Subs, VOSTFR) | ゴーストコンサート (Weekly)
description:
#### **Main info:**
- `[Trix]` -> that's me (@nekotrix), join [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=discord.com) AV1 weeb edition](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7)
`Ghost Concert: Missing Songs` -> anime title, info on [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=anidb.net) AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/19674), [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=myanimelist.net) MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/62852), [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=anilist.co) AniList](https://anilist.co/anime/201090)
`S01` -> season number, following [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=thetvdb.com) TheTVDB](https://thetvdb.com/series/ghost-concert-missing-songs)'s scheme
`E09` -> episode number (in that season), out of ?? (TBD)
- `WEBRip` -> encode from a WEB-DL source (here Crunchyroll via [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=nyaa.si) ToonsHub](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=0_0&q=ToonsHub))
`1080p` -> video resolution (1920x1080 @ 23.976 FPS)
`AV1` -> 📺 video format (Main + 4:2:0 + 10-bit = hardware friendly)
`Opus` -> 🔊 audio format (Japanese 🇯🇵, Stereo 2.0 @ 96kbps)
- `Multi Subs` -> 📄 multiple subtitles tracks including: **English, French, Arabic, Spanish (Latin America), Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese (Brazil), Russian, Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Indonesian, Malay, Thai, Vietnamese**
`VOSTFR` -> keyword to denote the presence of french subtitles
`Weekly` -> this anime is airing weekly ([LiveChart](https://www.livechart.me/anime/13372))

***
#### **Misc info:**
**Encoding details:**
- Filtering: Mild denoising
- Encoder: [SVT-AV1-Essential](https://github.com/nekotrix/SVT-AV1-Essential/): `--speed slow --crf 30`
> **Tired of VLC acting up with Opus audio, with subtitles, with color rendition? We recommend the _MPV_ media player for the best playback experience ([TheWiki Guide](https://thewiki.moe/guides/playback/)). Always keep your software up-to-date!**

> **Direct Download Link:** [DDL 1](https://gofile.io/d/6oJZH5) (GoFile), [DDL 2](https://buzzheavier.com/8z38osa4w6l8) (BuzzHeavier), [**other DDL, attachments download & more**]() (Soon)

Intro and OP sourced from ~~shitty~~ MPEG2 HDTV caps
Story 0001 and Story 0002 sourced from Netflix WEB-DL
Story 0003 sourced from DVDISO

Special Thanks to [Ichi656](https://nyaa.si/user/Ichi-656) for the WEB-DL source of Doraemon episodes and jmaeshawn for the DVDISO

Since TV Asahi Channel 1 rebroadcast this series from beginning, I decided to do encodes for this series from beginning.
This is really messy and low effort attempt of encodes with filtering (QTGMC[Intro and OP], IVTC[Story 0003], Deblock, Edgefix, AA, Dering, Dehalo, Resize, and Deband) 

I have to use DVD source for Story 0003 because the [logo removal artifacts is too visible](https://files.catbox.moe/jwfyt5.png) due to bitstarved H264 HDTV caps (from SkyPerfecTV Premium) I currently have. 
Although the HDTV caps are better because it's not cropped unlike the DVD and have better details compared to DVD.

Episodes are posted between daily to weekly, depends how busy I am, but I'm trying to encodes to replace anything that currently existed in this site.

[＊] If you have creditless OP1 OP2 and OP3 .vob files from Premium Collection DVD and original broadcast caps from 2008 to 2024, please let me know through Discord.
[＊] If you also have the BS朝日 (2020-2023), RKC, BSS, UMK, FBC, and YBS caps of Doraemon from prior to 2025, please let me know through Discord.

title: [Blasphemboys] Puttsun Make Love / Snap, Makeup, Love / ぷッつんメイクLOVE OVA (1987) [WEBDL AVC FLAC]
description:
![](https://i.imgur.com/ad9THw4.png)
| Raw | AnimeFesta WEBDL, ripped by Eternal_Blizzard (special thanks to Blankaex for supplying us with his real IP 27.137.111.241 in Japan) |
| --- | --- | 
| Translation, typesetting | Perevodildo | 
| Editing | Paul Geromini, Marty Mcflies ([LonelyChaser fansubs](https://www.lonelychaser-subs.net)), *imatu* |

The raw is a new 960x720 rescan of the show, ripped from AnimeFesta service by Eternal_Blizzard (he also dug up the lyrics for the ending and insert songs 🧎). While the video looks excellent and sexy, and blows the previously existing 2008 vintage 240p VHS rip out of the water, the audio is so muffled that even the ancient VHS rips have unironically superior MP3 sound. Enter the Toei preservation culture. Safe to assume they binned the masters/audio reels, and this remaster was restored from optical audio or some equally shitty source. I slapped the audio from the old 240p rip on the remastered video and synced it to the best of my ability, like I've done before for Magical Taruruuto-kun movies, though the VHS audio also had a few dropouts, during which the sound reverts to shitty optical for a second (I've still included the animefesta audio as the second track in case you like to bleed from your ears). In the process, I've discovered that...
1. Episodes 5 and 6 are mixed up in that ancient rip 
2. Each episode of this remaster is ~4 minutes shorter than the VHS version, because the latter had a trailer for the adjacent part of the OVA attached to it at the end: Ep1 promotes Ep2, Ep2 promotes Ep1, same with 3-4 and 5-6. 
To preserve that unique narration from becoming lost media, I've sliced those promotions from each part of the old video, and combined them all in the "next episode preview compilation" file (I've done this before for my Manga Nihon Keizai Nyuumon project). I subbed that compilation extremely lazily, though, because I don't think a single person will ever watch it fully, and it's a whole 14 minutes of extra material. Plus, it's still in 240p, so meh. 

The WEB-DL was a 1280x720p 16:9 pillarboxed video, while the show itself is in 3:4, so Marty asked someone to reencode it without the black bars for us. 

TL notes: 
• This show's title is a rather complicated matter. "Puttsun" part (spelled in hiragana) is a slang in Japanese, meaning something like "losing it." Throughout the show, I mostly translated it as "to snap." That word also happens to be the catchphrase of Saori, the heroine. Deceptively, "Make" (spelled in katakana) actually means "Makeup" in Japanese, which happens to be the passion of Yuji, the protagonist (though in one of the episode previews, Saori says specifically "make love," so as I said, there are many layers to this). Finally, "Love" in the title is spelled in English, and at least that part is straightforward: the show, as well as its parent manga," are a love story about Yuji and Saori growing closer, or in other words, about a Puttsun [enjoyer] and a Make[up artist] finding LOVE. 
• I translated the school's name as "Jouka Academy" (the name is probably a joke in itself). The show itself Romanizes it as "Zyoka" in some scenes, but that looks way too silly in English, so by consensus, we've decided to ignore it. If we went all the way with following the original's Romanization conventions, even the title itself would've been "Putun Make Love."
• Hori, aka Bargain Bin Playboy, appearing in episodes 1 and 4, is a psychopathic scion of an implausibly big zaibatsu, who's after the MC's love interest, and resembling Harako Tsutomu even visually. I have to wonder if the one in Taruruuto-kun was directly inspired by it, since this OVA aired one year before the Taruruuto manga began publishing. 
• In episode 4, Akimoto comments "What a rather chilling place name." about Yashagatake. Yasha means Yaksha in Japanese, a sort of buddhist demons; Gatake is "mountain peak."
• Episode 5: "Who-ah Twice as Nasty Fruit Ninja" {膃肭双嫌百菜切り}. Where do I start here... 膃肭 = fur seal, but I think here its only role is its reading—"otto" = o-ho/wow! 双嫌—usually, souken is dual sword, but here, "sword" (ken) is replaced with "disgust" (also ken). 百 is just "100" as in as lot of *item that comes next*. 菜切り = vegetable knife​, but also denotes the action of cutting vegetables. 

Episodes: 
1. Matchmaking Meeting Scramble {Ｏ・ＭＩ・Ａ・Ｉ・すくらんぶる}
2. Infiltrating the Girls' Part of the School! Catch it on Film! {女子部潜入 グッチョンフォーカス！！}
3. There! And Here Too? A Snappy Love Triangle {あっちも！こっちも？ ぷっつん三角関係}
4. Cursed Ski Slope, Jouka's Mountain Villa of Terror {呪いのゲレンデ 恐怖の城華山荘}
5. Big Sports Festival With Yuki's First Love! {由希の初恋大運動会}
6. Saori and Yuji's Summer Story {さおりと勇司の夏物語}

This anime contains imagery, words, and themes that are recommended for children of all ages. All content of this nature reflects the opinion of any individual who assisted with this release and we hope that we helped you, the viewer, to find the way to your lord & saviour Jesus Christ. May God bless you for a thousand years 🙏

It's hard to overstate how much all of us dig this show. Have another stitch from Marty!

- These chapters start with the left-side page first, start with a single page on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- Split chapters by Manga UP! are bundled together as a complete chapter.
- If the chapter has a title, the archive will contain a titled chapter sub-folder.

[Other Weekly UP! Batches](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+manga+up%21+updates)

----

Also available external (*duplicated* in this batch):
- Charlotte - The Tale of a Castle Maid, chapters 10-11 (Inside a new volume compilation batch) **Ch. 12 is new**.

Fixed:
- She's Drop-Dead Drunk, chapter 35 (was missing parts 4).
- The Villainess's Guide to (Not) Falling in Love, chapter 28 (was missing part 5).
